compressed_prompt: draft a resume for a first-time job seeker with 12 placeholders like [name], [address], [skills], no commas in formal tone
response:
**RESUME**

**[NAME]**
[ADDRESS]
[CITY] [STATE] [ZIP CODE]
[PHONE NUMBER]
[EMAIL ADDRESS]

**OBJECTIVE**
Highly motivated and detail-oriented individual seeking an entry-level position to apply [SKILLS] and gain practical experience in [INDUSTRY OR FIELD]. Eager to contribute enthusiasm and a strong work ethic to support team success.

**EDUCATION**
**[SCHOOL NAME]** – [CITY] [STATE]
[DEGREE OR CERTIFICATE] in [MAJOR OR FIELD OF STUDY]
[MONTH YEAR] – [MONTH YEAR]

**RELEVANT COURSEWORK**
[COURSE 1]
[COURSE 2]
[COURSE 3]

**SKILLS**
[SKILL 1]
[SKILL 2]
[SKILL 3]
[SKILL 4]
[SKILL 5]

**VOLUNTEER EXPERIENCE** *(if applicable)*
**[ORGANIZATION NAME]** – [CITY] [STATE]
[ROLE OR POSITION]
[MONTH YEAR] – [MONTH YEAR]
- [RESPONSIBILITY OR ACHIEVEMENT 1]
- [RESPONSIBILITY OR ACHIEVEMENT 2]

**PROJECTS** *(if applicable)*
**[PROJECT NAME]**
- [DESCRIPTION OF PROJECT AND ROLE]
- [OUTCOME OR SKILL DEMONSTRATED]

**CERTIFICATIONS** *(if applicable)*
[CERTIFICATION NAME] – [ISSUING ORGANIZATION]
[MONTH YEAR]

**REFERENCES**
Available upon request
